blockers.evidenceSummary: OCR blocks/date candidates/windows/atoms were created, but eventBundle update failed inside Prisma transaction with 'Transaction not found' in event-bundle-service.ts.
blockers.nextBestAction: Refactor event bundle write path to avoid long interactive transaction and rerun after code fix.

blockers.evidenceSummary: Case rerun completed OCR, bundles, narrative, and PDF after .env.local override removed stale credential-path failure; comparison still shows missing historical dates and institution normalization drift.
blockers.nextBestAction: Keep as proof of environment recovery; use as semantic-quality sample after transaction fix.

blockers.evidenceSummary: 서울성모병원.pdf exceeds current 20 MB upload limit (25432858 bytes), so rerun never reached OCR/semantic stages.
blockers.nextBestAction: Add oversized-PDF intake handling (preprocess, split, or separate upload path) before rerun.

blockers.evidenceSummary: EventAtom update timed out inside event-bundle-service transaction after OCR/date candidate generation had already succeeded.
blockers.nextBestAction: Shorten bundle transaction or batch writes outside interactive transaction, then rerun.
notes: not an OCR credential failure anymore

blockers.evidenceSummary: EventAtom update failed with 'Transaction not found' after runtime produced OCR blocks and semantic precursors.
blockers.nextBestAction: Fix transaction handling in event bundle stage and rerun.

blockers.evidenceSummary: Smoke test case completed end-to-end without credential-path failure, proving runtime recovery; partial match still misses several golden dates and institution normalization.
blockers.nextBestAction: Treat as recovery proof and quality benchmark; proceed to targeted downstream fixes before more reruns.

blockers.evidenceSummary: Runtime reached OCR blocks/date candidates/windows/atoms, then failed with closed transaction error before bundles.
blockers.nextBestAction: Fix bundle transaction handling; rerun only after code change.

blockers.evidenceSummary: EventBundle create exceeded interactive transaction timeout after semantic precursor generation succeeded.
blockers.nextBestAction: Reduce transaction duration in event-bundle-service; rerun after fix.

blockers.evidenceSummary: Single-doc case still hit eventBundle create timeout after OCR/date/window/atom stages, indicating a global downstream bottleneck rather than coordinate-reference absence.
blockers.nextBestAction: Fix bundle transaction path first; do not rerun unchanged.

blockers.evidenceSummary: Large multi-doc case failed at eventBundle create timeout after successful OCR and semantic precursor generation.
blockers.nextBestAction: Use as stress case after transaction fix; avoid blind rerun before code change.
